tutorial.title: Welcome to {{appName}}!
tutorial.subtitle: Your complete guide to getting started

gym.title: Gym Tracking
gym.desc: Log your workouts with exercises, sets, reps, and weight. Use templates to save your favorite routines.

activities.title: Activities
activities.desc: Track outdoor activities like running, cycling, and walking with GPS, duration, and distance.

weight.title: Weight Tracking
weight.desc: Log your weight and track your progress over time with charts and statistics.

notes.title: Notes
notes.desc: Write notes and organize them into folders. Add voice recordings, images, and videos.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.desc: Set one-time or recurring reminders with push notifications to stay on track.

habits.title: Habits
habits.desc: Build daily habits and track your streaks. See your consistency on the feed.

todo.title: To-Do Lists
todo.desc: Create task lists to organize your training goals and daily tasks.

chat.title: Chat
chat.desc: Message your friends, share sessions, and react to messages. Send text, images, videos, and voice messages.

reports.title: Reports
reports.desc: Get weekly and monthly summaries of your training, weight, habits, and activities.

tutorial.tap_to_read: Tap Details to read the full guide

togglePin.maxPinned: You can only pin 10 items. Unpin something first.

deleteSession.confirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete this session?
